2603.19957.title: HiPath: Hierarchical Vision-Language Alignment for Structured Pathology Report Prediction
2603.19957.paper_summary: Pathology reports are structured, multi-granular documents encoding diagnostic conclusions, histological grades, and ancillary test results across one or more anatomical sites; yet existing pathology vision-language models (VLMs) reduce this output to a flat label or free-form text. We present HiPath, a lightweight VLM framework built on frozen UNI2 and Qwen3 backbones that treats structured report prediction as its primary training objective. Three trainable modules totalling 15M parameters address complementary aspects of the problem: a Hierarchical Patch Aggregator (HiPA) for multi-image visual encoding, Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HiCL) for cross-modal alignment via optimal transport, and Slot-based Masked Diagnosis Prediction (Slot-MDP) for structured diagnosis generation. Trained on 749K real-world Chinese pathology cases from three hospitals, HiPath achieves 68.9% strict and 74.7% clinically acceptable accuracy with a 97.3% safety rate, outperforming all baselines under the same frozen backbone. Cross-hospital evaluation confirms generalisation with only a 3.4pp drop in strict accuracy while maintaining 97.1% safety.
2603.19957.paper_summary_zh: 病理報告是結構化的多層次文檔，編碼診斷結論、組織學等級和一個或多個解剖部位的輔助測試結果；然而，現有的病理視覺-語言模型（VLMs）將這些輸出簡化為平面標籤或自由格式文本。我們提出了 HiPath，一個基於凍結的 UNI2 和 Qwen3 骨幹的輕量級 VLM 框架，將結構化報告預測作為其主要訓練目標。三個可訓練模塊總計 1500 萬個參數，解決問題的互補方面：一個用於多圖像視覺編碼的層次化補丁聚合器（HiPA），一個通過最優運輸進行跨模態對齊的層次對比學習（HiCL），以及一個用於結構化診斷生成的基於插槽的掩碼診斷預測（Slot-MDP）。HiPath 在來自三家醫院的 749K 真實中國病理案例上進行訓練，達到 68.9% 的嚴格準確率和 74.7% 的臨床可接受準確率，安全率為 97.3%，在相同的凍結骨幹下超越所有基準。跨醫院評估確認了泛化，僅有 3.4 個百分點的嚴格準確率下降，同時保持 97.1% 的安全性。
2603.19957.author: Ruicheng Yuan et.al.
2603.19957.authors: Ruicheng Yuan, Zhenxuan Zhang, Anbang Wang, Liwei Hu, Xiangqian Hua, Yaya Peng, Jiawei Luo, Guang Yang
